div.class: p-4 border-bottom bg-light d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center rounded-top

div.small: Create areas, define routes, map shops, and manage the geographical hierarchy for your order bookers.

span.class: badge bg-info px-3 py-2 text-white d-inline-flex align-items-center shadow-sm
span.title: Live mapping is enabled for shop coordinates

button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary fw-bold shadow-sm d-inline-flex align-items-center ms-3
button.title: Refresh Territory Data

button.class: btn btn-outline-danger ms-3 fw-bold shadow-sm d-inline-flex align-items-center
button.title: View Archived Items

div.class: p-4 bg-white border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-3

div.small: Zones represent the highest level of your territory.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark d-flex align-items-center text-white ms-2 shadow-sm
button.title: Create a new overarching zone

div.title: Toggle off to disable all routes inside this zone
div.label: Active Status

th.title: Number of routes operating in this zone

td.p: No zones configured yet. Click 'Add New Zone' to define your first territory.

tr.td: No zones match your search or filter criteria.

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border px-2 py-1

div.class: p-4 bg-white border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-3

div.small: Routes are specific paths within a Zone.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark d-flex align-items-center text-white ms-2 shadow-sm
button.title: Create a new travel route

div.title: Disable to temporarily pause visits on this route
div.label: Active Status

th.title: Total number of shops assigned to this route

td.p: No routes found. Create your first route to start assigning shops.

tr.td: No routes match your search or filter criteria.

span.class: badge bg-light text-dark border px-2 py-1

div.class: p-4 bg-light border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

h4.class: fw-bold text-dark mb-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap

div.small:
Registered by:
(Booker ID: )
Distributor / not recorded

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Close details and return to list

select.title: Switching to Cash disables credit limits

div.class: d-flex h-100 justify-content-center align-items-center text-muted fw-bold

t.div: No valid GPS coordinates found for this shop. Please edit the shop to add Latitude and Longitude.

div.class: p-4 bg-light border rounded text-muted small
p-4 bg-light border rounded text-muted small
p-4 bg-light border rounded text-muted small
p-4 bg-light border rounded text-muted small
border-top pt-3 mt-2 d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-md-center gap-3

t.small: Verify photos, location, and details, then approve or reject this application.
This shop is approved and available for schedules and visits.
This shop was rejected. You can approve it if the application should proceed.

div.class: p-4 bg-white border-bottom d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row justify-content-between align-items-lg-center gap-3

div.small: Register, Review, approve, and manage the retail shops.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark d-flex align-items-center text-white ms-2 shadow-sm
button.title: Manually register a new shop to the database

td.p: No shops registered. Register a new shop to start building your network.

tr.td: No shops match your search or filter criteria.

button.t-att-title: shop.shop_approval_state === 'pending' ? 'Open details and verify before approving' : (shop.shop_approval_state === 'rejected' ? 'Open details to review and approve again' : 'View full details and live map')

ul.class: dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end show shadow border mt-1 py-1
ul.style: display: block; position: absolute; right: 0; left: auto; z-index: 1050; min-width: 10rem;

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Discard changes and return

div.small: Provide the general identity and contact information for the shop owner.
Assign the shop to a route and provide exact GPS coordinates for the map view. You can find these by right-clicking a location in Google Maps.

select.title: You must select a Zone first to see available routes

div.small: Determine if the shop pays immediately (Cash) or requires a credit limit for deferred payments.

input.title: Any existing unpaid amount prior to this registration

div.small: Note: Leave file inputs blank to keep existing photos unchanged.
Upload clear, well-lit photos. These will be reviewed during the approval process.

t.t-esc: this.state.editingShopId ? 'Update Shop Information' : 'Register Shop & Submit for Review'

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border shadow-sm fw-bold text-dark px-3 mb-4 d-flex align-items-center
button.title: Return to Previous Tab

div.small: Restore or permanently manage soft-deleted zones, routes, and shops.
